title: Sith Council
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the original Sith Council|[[Skere Kaan]]'s [[Sith Council (Brotherhood of Darkness)|council]]}} {{Organization |image=[[File:Sith_council_2.jpg]] |name=Sith Council |type=Council[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 3]] |founder=[[Exiles]]''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]'' |leader=[[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] (Leader)
|subgroup= |headquarters=[[Sith Citadel (Ziost)|Sith Citadel]], [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]] |locations= |formed= |founded=[[6900 BBY]]''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]'' established that the Sith Council existed within 3-4 months' of the Exiles' arrival on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], which [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] says happened in 6900 BBY |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved=[[4999 BBY]]''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]'' |restored=[[4980 BBY]], into the [[Dark Council]] |affiliation=[[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] }} {{Quote|Those of us who came to this world with rank and ambition make up Ziost's new Sith Council. Ajunta Pall is our Dark Lord, or Jen'ari.|Sorzus Syn|''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''}} The '''Sith Council''' was a group of ten [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] within the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] who served as [[Advisor/Legends|advisors]] to the reigning [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]. This Council convened in a [[Sith Citadel (Ziost)|great citadel]] on [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]]. The Sith Council managed the affairs of the Empire. Each Lord that sat on the Council personally ruled over a minimum of a dozen [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]. ==History== When the [[Exiles]] established their [[Capital/Legends|capital]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' on [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]] in [[6900 BBY]],[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] [[Ajunta Pall]] gathered those with rank and ambition who had accompanied him and created the Sith Council. The Council convened in a [[Sith Citadel (Ziost)|great citadel]] on Ziost. [[File:Sith_council_1.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The council elects Naga Sadow as the next Dark Lord]] [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]], [[Ludo Kressh]], [[Simus]], [[Dor Gal-ram]], and [[Horak-mul]] were five of the ten [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] on the Council under [[Marka Ragnos]]. After Ragnos's [[Death/Legends|death]], two Lords on the council, Naga Sadow and Ludo Kressh, fought over the position of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]. This conflict created a rift within the council, with several lords siding with Kressh, and the rest siding with Sadow. Eventually, Sadow was able to convince the council to make him Dark Lord after he convinced them that the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was executing hit-and-run attacks within the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Empire]]. After Kressh discovered the deception, he and two other lords [[Battle of Khar Delba|attacked]] [[Naga Sadow's Khar Delba citadel|Sadow's fortress]],[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 4]] but they were soundly defeated, and Sadow secured his hold over his title.[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 5]] The Sith Lord [[Tenebrae|Vitiate]] summoned the remaining members of the Council, along with almost 8,000 other [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], to his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Nathema]], where he broke their wills and forced them to participate in the [[Ritual of Nathema]]—an act that killed everyone on Nathema other than Vitiate. ==Behind the scenes== In a scene in [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 3]] the faces of eight members are shown (excluding Naga Sadow and the already dead Simus). Only one other person (besides Sadow) on the council seems to have Dark Jedi blood with the absence of protruding eyebrow ridges and a squashed nose. [[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] refers to it both as "a tribunal of Sith Lords" and the "Sith council." ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of the Sith Council}} *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 3]] {{1st}} *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 1]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 2]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 3]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 4]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 5]] *''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]'' {{Ab|The Old Republic: Revan (audiobook)}} *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' ==Sources== *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *[[The Journal of Master Gnost-Dural (real-life book)|''The Journal of Master Gnost-Dural'']] *''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]'' *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Consejo Sith |tr=Sith Konseyi |hu=Sith Tanács }} [[Category:Legislatures]] [[Category:Sith Empire organizations]] [[Category:Sith political factions]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Sith Councilors]] }}
